name: superpowers
description: USER LEVEL: You get guardrails that prevent sloppy AI output—TDD, verification before claiming done, and systematic debugging instead of guess-and-retry. PROJECT LEVEL: Agent-driven work lands with fewer regressions because every change goes through structured review, worktree isolation, and evidence-based completion gates. Battle-tested skills for agentic coding—TDD, systematic debugging, parallel subagents, Git worktrees, verification gates, and disciplined review before merge. BEST SUITED FOR: • Solo developers who want agent discipline without a team process • Teams adopting agent-assisted coding and need quality guardrails • Projects where regressions from AI changes are costly
